reviews.comment:
Muy buena ubicación, excelente higiene en los sanitarios, muy buena atención en la playa y servicompras. Si tuviera mas espacio en este último estaría excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location, superb restroom hygiene, and very good service at the beach and convenience store. If the latter had more space, it would be even better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDNmVhWTdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
